expectations.text: References apollo_request() retry logic with exponential backoff
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly states: 'كود daily_sync.py لديه بالفعل 5x exponential backoff على أخطاء 429 و 500 في notion_helpers.py'

expectations.text: Suggests waiting before retry or using backfill mode
expectations.evidence: Response recommends: 'انتظر 15-30 دقيقة قبل إعادة التشغيل' and provides concrete commands for backfill: 'python daily_sync.py --mode backfill --days 7'

expectations.text: Mentions rate limiting as the cause of 429 errors
expectations.evidence: Response explains: 'رسالة الخطأ 429 Too Many Requests من Apollo تعني أنك تجاوزت حد معدل الطلبات (Rate Limit)'

expectations.text: Provides a concrete command to re-run the sync
expectations.evidence: Multiple concrete commands provided: 'python daily_sync.py --mode incremental --hours 26' and 'python daily_sync.py --mode backfill --days 7' and 'python daily_sync.py --mode full'
